mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_REPLY VALUES(#{id}, #{replyContent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{postId}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBR.id, TBR.REPLY_CONTENT, TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBR.POST_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL FROM TBL_REPLY TBR JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBR.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBR.POST_ID = #{id} ORDER BY TBR.ID DESC
